summary_text: **Execution path (current repo)** 1. `note-semi-auto` calls thumbnail generator, then optional upload: [`note-semi-auto.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/note-semi-auto.sh#L140), [`note-semi-auto.sh`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/note-semi-auto.sh#L151) 2. Thumbnail generation happens in [`note-thumbnail-gen.js`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/note-thumbnail-gen.js#L283). 3. If `thumbnail_overlay_title` / `thumbnail_overlay_subtitle` exist, overlay is composited by [`note-thumbnail-compose.py`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/note-thumbnail-compose.py#L85). 4. Upload path is [`note-draft-upload.js`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/note-draft-upload.js#L375) + eyecatch endpoint [`note-draft-upload.js`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/note-draft-upload.js#L427). **Exact command recipe (once target draft files are known)** ```bash # 0) Optional check (no write) node scripts/local/integrations/note-thumbnail-gen.js <draft.md> --dry-run # 1) Regenerate thumbnail and overwrite configured eyecatch path (Gemini/auto) NOTE_THUMBNAIL_PROVIDER=auto \ node scripts/local/integrations/note-thumbnail-gen.js <draft.md> # 2) Force Manus generation for the second post NOTE_THUMBNAIL_PROVIDER=manus \ node scripts/local/integrations/note-thumbnail-gen.js <draft.md> # 3) Wrapper form (same flow via adapter) NOTE_THUMBNAIL_PROVIDER=manus \ bash scripts/local/integrations/note-semi-auto.sh \ --mode execute --action thumbnail --draft-file <draft.md> # 4) If note.com draft swap is needed too bash scripts/local/integrations/note-semi-auto.sh \ --mode execute --action thumbnail-upload --draft-file <draft.md> ``` **How “replace” is determined** - Output file path is automatic from frontmatter: `eyecatch_image_path` set -> overwrite that file; otherwise `<draft-basename>-thumbnail.png` ([`note-thumbnail-gen.js`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/note-thumbnail-gen.js#L104), [`note-thumbnail-gen.js`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/note-thumbnail-gen.js#L247)). **Blockers** - No `Xauto`-specific adapter/path found in this repo, so final publish-side swap target is unknown from repo-only evidence. - Font is currently hardcoded to Arial/Hiragino candidates, not Noto Sans JP ([`note-thumbnail-compose.py`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/note-thumbnail-compose.py#L19)). - `NOTE_THUMBNAIL_PROVIDER=manus` requires local Manus modules at fixed paths and valid Manus auth; otherwise it fails hard when forced ([`note-thumbnail-gen.js`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/note-thumbnail-gen.js#L312)). - Upload step requires valid `NOTE_SESSION_V5` (and possibly `NOTE_XSRF_TOKEN`) ([`note-draft-upload.js`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/integrations/note-draft-upload.js#L236)).
